data.title: Xuelei Fragrance Museum in Guangzhou sets Guinness World Record as largest fragrance museum.
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, as of December 12, 2025, the Xuelei Fragrance Museum has gained international recognition by being officially certified by Guinness World Records as the world's largest fragrance museum. This achievement solidifies Guangzhou's presence on the global fragrance map. The museum's record-breaking size marks a significant milestone for this emerging cultural destination.
Launches of KABs in the east of Kharkiv region.

data.title: Coinbase to reveal prediction markets, tokenized stocks on livestream. Joined prediction market coalition with Kalshi and other US operators. Livestream set for Wednesday.
data.description: Next week, Coinbase is set to unveil its latest products in a livestream event. This comes after the company joined forces with Kalshi and other US operators to form a prediction market coalition. According to reports, this move is seen as significant within the industry.
UK November inflation expectations 3.5%

data.title: Senate Banking Committee Chair Sen. Tim Scott states progress on cryptocurrency bill, meets with top bank CEOs, aims to establish US as cryptocurrency capital. Valuable feedback from industry.
data.description: Senator Tim Scott, Chair of the Senate Banking Committee, revealed that significant strides are being made in advancing legislation for regulating the cryptocurrency market structure. The report, published Thursday, indicated that Sen. Scott had productive discussions with Bank of America, Citi, and Wells Fargo CEOs regarding the proposed bill. The aim is to establish a comprehensive federal framework for overseeing digital assets. Sen. Scott emphasized that the bill's progress signifies moving towards positioning the U.S. as the global hub for cryptocurrencies. Valuable insights from industry leaders have contributed to shaping the legislation, with feedback from both the banking and cryptocurrency sectors proving instrumental. The engagement included separate meetings with Democrats. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Smartee held its first GS clinical summit in Cologne, enhancing collaboration with orthodontists in DACH region.
data.description: In Cologne, Germany on November 27, 2025, Smartee Denti-Technology organized its inaugural clinical summit specifically targeted at GS, emphasizing its partnership with orthodontists in the DACH region. Smartee, present in Germany for over 2 years, aims to strengthen its relationship with professionals in the field.

data.title: atNorth's ICE03 Data Center in Iceland wins Environmental Impact Award; recognized for innovative design. Dec. 12, 2025.
data.description: A company based in Reykjavík, Iceland, named atNorth, has been recognized with the Environmental Impact Award for its ICE03 data center design. The award was received on December 12, 2025. atNorth is a prominent provider of high-density colocation and built-to-suit data centers in the Nordic region. The innovative and responsible approach taken in designing the ICE03 data center has earned them this prestigious recognition.

data.title: Coinbase set to launch prediction markets and tokenized stocks on Dec. 17, partnering with Kalshi and US operators. Livestream event planned.
data.description: Coinbase will be presenting its latest products during a livestream scheduled for next week following its recent collaboration with Kalshi and several other American operators in a prediction market coalition. According to reports from Bloomberg, this move comes as part of Coinbase's strategic efforts to enhance its services and offerings. The livestream event aims to reach a wide audience and will serve as a platform to introduce the new products to the market. This development comes as Coinbase continues to expand and innovate in the industry.

data.title: Standard Chartered Malaysia and AirAsia parent, Capital A, to pilot ringgit stablecoin for wholesale use in Malaysia.
data.description: Malaysian airline AirAsia's parent company, Capital A, and Standard Chartered Malaysia are collaborating to introduce and test a stablecoin pegged to the Malaysian ringgit. This initiative aims to target wholesale use cases within the financial sector.

data.title: WeRide and Uber launch autonomous robotaxi rides in Dubai with RTA, available in Umm Suqeim and Jumeirah.
data.description: In Dubai, WeRide, a leading autonomous driving technology company listed on NASDAQ (WRD) and HKEX (0800), along with Uber Technologies (UBER) and Dubai's Roads and Transport Authority (RTA), have introduced Robotaxi passenger rides through the Uber app. The service is now operational in Umm Suqeim and Jumeirah, prominent tourist areas in Dubai.

data.title: Phemex co-hosts event showcasing crypto security at 6th anniversary, alongside Cointelegraph, attended by Web3 leaders.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, the 7th edition of LONGITUDE was co-hosted by Phemex, a user-centric crypto exchange, and Cointelegraph at the Rosewood Hotel in Abu Dhabi during Abu Dhabi Finance Week. The event featured prominent leaders in Web3 and aimed to facilitate discussions on the future of the digital economy.
